facebook.caption: If your suitcase has room for one more thing, LOCA - Night Market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is worth a stop. This little gift shop sits right in the heart of Phu Quoc's evening scene and holds a remarkable 4.9/5 from nearly a thousand reviews, which tells you visitors genuinely love what they find here. Think curated souvenirs, local keepsakes, and the kind of finds you won't spot in every airport duty-free. Practical tip: come in the evening when the street buzzes with life and browsing feels like part of the whole night-out experience.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the shelves fill your screen with color. LOCA - Night Market packs a lot of charm into a small space, and the clips show exactly why nearly a thousand happy shoppers gave it a near-perfect score. Evening light, great finds, zero regrets about the extra luggage weight.

instagram.caption: Souvenir shopping just got a serious upgrade. LOCA - Night Market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is rated 4.9/5 by nearly 1,000 visitors, and one evening browse will show you why. Come after dark for the full vibe.
instagram.video_caption: Colorful shelves, happy shoppers, and a 4.9-star reputation that speaks for itself. LOCA - Night Market is your sign to save room in that suitcase.

tiktok.caption: 4.9 stars from 941 people at a gift shop in Phu Quoc. LOCA - Night Market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo might be tiny but it delivers. #PhuQuoc #NightMarket #VietnamTravel #SouvenirHunting
